doc: One-shot sample voice (ADR-0016/0032). A held gate fires the 'blip' sample; a held freq shifts its playback rate around root MIDI 57 (~220 Hz). Hosted N times by a `voicer` (the host allocates notes across the voices); the sample resource resolves recursively when the host loads this patch. interface: freq/gate in, audio out (no envelope, so no `active` — the voicer keys liveness on gate).

nodes.doc: Gate edge fires the sample; freq sets the playback rate. Root MIDI 57 = the sample's recorded pitch.
